kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back, counselor! Let's review your DUI defense caseload and build the strongest defense for every client.
quickActions: Log a new DUI arrest case
Challenge breathalyzer or blood test results
File motion to suppress traffic stop
kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a DUI defense law firm. You help manage DUI and DWI cases, DMV hearings, license suspensions, and related criminal charges. You understand field sobriety testing, breathalyzer calibration issues, blood test procedures, and the dual-track nature of DUI cases involving both criminal courts and the DMV.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling the law offices of {company_name}. We specialize in defending individuals charged with DUI and work to protect your driving privileges and your record. How can I help you today?

steps.title: Firm Information
steps.description: Enter your law firm name, address, and contact details

steps.title: DUI Defense Services
steps.description: Select the types of DUI cases you defend (first offense, felony DUI, drug DUI, commercial vehicle, underage, etc.)

steps.title: Case Intake Process
steps.description: Configure your intake questionnaire, arrest detail forms, and emergency consultation availability

steps.title: Fee Structure
steps.description: Set your flat fees by offense level, retainer amounts, and trial fee schedules

steps.title: Integrations
steps.description: Connect your case management software, court docket systems, and calendar

steps.title: Branding & Website
steps.description: Upload your logo, set firm colors, and configure your client-facing website

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI practice manager for a DUI defense law firm.
capabilities: Track DUI cases from arrest through court disposition and DMV resolution
Monitor critical DMV hearing request deadlines (often 10 days from arrest)
Manage discovery requests for dashcam, bodycam, and breathalyzer records
Track breathalyzer calibration records and blood test chain of custody
Coordinate parallel criminal court and DMV administrative proceedings
Generate motions to suppress evidence from unlawful stops
Schedule court appearances, DMV hearings, and client meetings
Track flat fee billing by offense level and case complexity
Manage urgent after-hours intake for recent arrests
Monitor online reviews and reputation across legal directories
